synopsis: Case 97-10 - Raymond Larsen vs. Pacific Presbytery (Complaint) was withdrawn by the complainant. No full decision text found; case appears only as a docket list entry on p. 105 with the notation that it was withdrawn by complainant.
notes: This case appears only as an entry in the Standing Judicial Commission's case list (Section III, case 11 in the list on p. 104). The only substantive mention is on p. 105, which states: 'Cases 97-1 - George Felton vs. Grace Presbytery, 97-10 and 97-12 - both Raymond Larsen vs Pacific Presbytery were withdrawn by the complainants.' No separate decision section exists for Case 97-10. Case 97-11 (Raymond Larsen vs. Pacific Presbytery - Appeal) appears on p. 146 and was found administratively out of order. Case 97-12 was also withdrawn.
